heading: Heading

_heading.desc: Heading which shows all the time

content: This is the text which appears when the control is not collapsed.

_headingTheme.desc: Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom. False for no theme.

_contentTheme.desc: Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom. False for no theme.

_color.desc: Color of letters. Can be name, #RRGGBB or rgb(R,G,B).

_backgroundColor.desc: Color of background. Can be name, #RRGGBB, rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_htmltemplate:
"
''} data-theme='{headingTheme}'{/if}{if contentTheme<>''} data-content-theme='{contentTheme}'{/if}{mini} {iconPos} style='{if fontSize<>''}font-size:{fontSize!p}; {/if}{if fontFamily<>''}font-family:{fontFamily}; {/if}{if fontStyle<>''}font-style:{fontStyle}; {/if}{if fontWeight<>''}font-weight:{fontWeight}; {/if}{if color<>''}color:{color}; {/if}{if backgroundColor<>''}background-color:{backgroundColor}; {/if}{hidden}{style!j}' >

{heading!j}

",{_childhtml},"

{content!j}

",
